name: Mayer Holdings Limited
summary: Mayer Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the processing, manufacture, and sale of steel sheets and pipes, and other steel products in the People's Republic of China. The company provides its products under the MAYER brand. It also offers urban renewal project planning and consulting, business and economic consulting, and real estate development services. The company also exports its products. Mayer Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2003 and is headquartered in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
